name: orchestrator
trigger_condition: Task involves planning, execution, verification, or pipeline
description: Orchestrator skills: task classification (priority/risk), plan drafting (LLM-assisted JSON plans), safe execution (sandbox, snapshots), verification (lint, tests, secrets check), diff preview, pipeline reporting, rollback coordination.
required_tools: planner, executor, verifier, diff_preview, snapshots, quarantine
expected_output: Safe, verified task execution with rollback capability
known_limitations: Requires LLM endpoint for planning; pipeline runs sequentially — no parallel execution
